title: Real Page Focus Rule — Phase 20.6
principle: Phase 19/20 daily execution MUST prioritize real content pages over thin tool/scenario parameterized variants.

daily_execution_rules.first_click_attacks: Target priorities 1-4 first. Tool/scenario (6) only if no real pages qualify.
daily_execution_rules.near_winner_rank_pushes: Target priorities 1-4 first. Parent calculators before thin variants.
daily_execution_rules.internal_links: Point to parent calculators/guides/decisions (1-5). NEVER to thin variants (6).
daily_execution_rules.ctr_fixes: Apply to real pages (1-4) and parent calculators only. NO broad template CTR fixes on thin variants (6).
daily_execution_rules.meta_template_changes: Only modify seo-utils.ts templates for parent calculators. NO click-optimized templates for thin variant generators.

tool_scenario_governance.rule: Tool/scenario pages are NOT upgraded as standalone SEO pages.
tool_scenario_governance.title_standard: DESCRIPTIVE only (e.g., 'Mortgage Calculator: $900K, 30-Year, 7%') NOT click-bait (e.g., 'Calculate YOUR Payment!')
tool_scenario_governance.meta_standard: Describe what the page calculates. No Q&A hooks, urgency, or click-bait.
